input.summary: They want better visibility into shipment delays and weekly exception reporting.
input.next_step: Share sample dashboard and schedule technical validation next Tuesday

good_output_should: Be specific to stated pain points and outcomes, include next Tuesday validation CTA, and avoid adding unstated pricing or integrations.
Stay professional despite sparse details, avoid fabrication, and include [NEEDS HUMAN INPUT] prompts for missing decision process/timeline/meeting.

input.summary: Asked whether our platform is SOC 2 compliant and can integrate with a legacy internal CRM.
desired_outcomes: No disruption to existing CRM workflows

good_output_should: Avoid claiming compliance status or guaranteed integration if not explicitly provided; include review flag for technical/compliance confirmation.

input.summary: Multi-region team with inconsistent support metrics and high escalations after promotions.
input.timeline: Decision by end of next month
input.next_step: Send sample leadership dashboard and propose implementation workshop

good_output_should: Summarize key points concisely, map value clearly, and keep length controlled without dropping key next steps.

input.summary: Interested but unsure whether budget is available this year.

good_output_should: Preserve uncertainty language, avoid pushing aggressive commitment, and ask a lightweight clarifying question for next checkpoint.
